prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 约第31名（2026年），近年排名稳定在29–32名区间，属国内顶尖高校行列；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第16位（高热），短视频曝 光度较高，报考关注度升温；化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-，共8个A-及 以上学科，工科与管理学科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化2024–2026年均为高热推荐，计算机类持续推荐，与该校理科组招生专业高度 匹配；本省2026年考生总数约48000人（较2025年47669人略增）；湖南大学在青海省招生占比极小（约0.4%），属跨省招生，无本 地保护效应；2026年大幅缩招后外省考生竞争格局变化有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年计划大幅缩招（竞争加剧）、学校高声誉与高热专业吸引力，在 2025年基准1509名基础上预计位次前移；预测最低位次约1135名，区间965–1305名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 1684 → 1653 → 1299 → 1265 → 1509. After consecutive advances in 2023–2024, there was a significant backward shift of about 244 places in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1509. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 41 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 45 in 2024, and 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28 students, a sharp reduction of about 39% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 31st on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; recent reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking 16th (high heat), with high short video exposure, increasing application attention; Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, a total of 8 A- and above disciplines, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation were highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, Computer Science continuously recommended, highly matching the university's science group enrollment majors; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025); Hunan University's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very small (about 0.4%), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment with no local protection effect; after the significant enrollment reduction in 2026, the competitive landscape for out-of-province students changes limitedly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensified competition), the university's high reputation and high-heat major attractiveness, based on the 2025 baseline of 1509, the ranking is expected to move forward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1135, with a range of 965–1305.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 339 → 490 → 506 → 476 → 542, showing a general backward shift in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 203 places over the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 542 places; the provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 9 students in 2021, 12 students in 2022–2023, 13 students in 2024, and 15 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36 students, a significant expansion of 140% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 31st in the main list of Soft Science (2026), with stable rankings in the 29–32 range in recent years; reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion; ranked 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), indicating high application attention; Business Administration rated A, Applied Economics rated A-, highly correlated with the liberal arts group's enrollment majors such as Economics, Finance, and Accounting.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law recommended for 2024–2026, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Accounting/Finance/Auditing recommended, the overall popularity of the liberal arts group's enrollment majors is relatively hot; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025); Hunan University's enrollment proportion in Qinghai is very small (about 0.4%), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local protection effect; after the significant expansion in 2026, the competition landscape for out-of-province examinees will change limitedly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (easing competition), the high reputation of the school, and the relatively hot popularity of liberal arts majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 542 places, the ranking is expected to shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 967 places, with a range of 822–1112 places.
